title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 6 - 2017: 20 Area Dimensions page

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about working on a map/area dimensions project for Boulder, involving circles, backgrounds, and Google Maps integration. He discusses his R&D day working on visual layouts, listening to Wikipedia audio files, and plans to finish the project over the weekend before an upcoming bike race.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited to be close to finishing and seeing it come together on his website
wishes he had a faster computer but thinks he may just be better at using it now
